name: My Poultry Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onions.
2. Pulse the broken rolls or bread in a processor until coarsely crumbly.
3. Add seasonings to the stuffing and blend with your hands.
4. Incorporate the onions and toss well.
5. Gradually add the small amount of liquid (turkey stock from giblets or water) until the mixture forms a ball when pressed but is not soggy.
6. Stuff the bird and cook as usual.
